backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Natural Hunt backend, managing user profiles, plant identification records, rewards/points, and a leaderboard using access-controlled storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades old user profiles (name + identifier only) to new profiles by adding a default anime character and 'newbie' badge.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (leaderboard, anime character selection, character animations, etc.) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, borders, chart palette, sidebar) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Natural Hunt React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating authentication state, profile setup, character selection flow, and navigation between camera, discoveries, and leaderboard views.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedCharacte: Presentational component that renders an anime character image with a character-specific CSS animation class and a radial glow/aura effect behind it.
frontend/src/components/AuthLayout.tsx: Provides a full-screen authentication layout wrapper with a dark botanical gradient background, decorative blobs, a logo, and a footer. Wraps child components (login/register forms) in a centered card.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with tabs for Camera, Leaderboard, and Discoveries, plus a floating points badge fetched via useGetPoints. Highlights the active tab with a styled pill and dot indicator.
frontend/src/components/CameraView.tsx: Manages live camera feed, photo capture, and plant identification flow with states for idle, scanning, result, not-plant, and not-real. Saves successful identifications to the backend and displays result/overlay components accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelecti: Displays a scrollable grid of anime characters grouped by franchise for the user to pick a leaderboard avatar. Confirms selection by calling the useSelectCharacter mutation and invokes onComplete on success.
Shows the user's plant discovery collection with animated stat cards (species count, total points, scan count) and a scrollable list of identified plants with dates. Fetches data via useGetDiscoveries and useGetPoints hooks.
Renders a draggable anime mascot image that can be freely repositioned via mouse or touch, or animated to stand beside a board position when animationMode is 'standBeside'. Clamps position within the viewport bounds.
frontend/src/components/GoogleSignInButt: A button component that triggers Internet Identity login with a Google-branded appearance, showing a loading spinner while authentication is in progress.
frontend/src/components/InternetIdentity: A smaller, ghost-style button component that triggers Internet Identity login, displaying a shield icon and loading state during authentication.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: A full-screen leaderboard view that fetches and displays ranked users by points, highlighting the current user and using rank-specific icons and styles for the top three positions.
A full-screen overlay shown when the captured image is not a plant, displaying the detected category with an emoji, a tip, and a 'Try Again' button.
frontend/src/components/NotRealOverlay.t: A full-screen overlay shown when the captured image is not a real photo, explaining the requirement for a real camera photo and providing usage tips with a 'Try Again' button.
frontend/src/components/PlantInfoBoard.t: An animated info board overlay that displays a plant's name and benefits with a typewriter effect and text-to-speech narration, auto-dismissing after speech completes.
frontend/src/components/PlantResultPanel: A slide-up panel component that displays plant identification results with a hero image, confetti animation, points badge, a draggable mascot, and a dismissible plant info board.
frontend/src/components/PointsCounter.ts: A small UI component that fetches and displays the user's current points with a pop animation when points increase.
frontend/src/components/SignInScreen.tsx: A sign-in form component supporting Google, Internet Identity, and credential-based login with email/phone and password validation.
frontend/src/components/SignUpScreen.tsx: A sign-up form component that collects name, email or phone, and password, validates inputs, and saves the user profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: An animated welcome/landing screen that requests camera permission and navigates to the main app, featuring a botanical background and feature highlights.
frontend/src/data/animeCharacters.ts: Static data file defining a list of selectable anime characters (Naruto, One Piece, Bleach, Dragon Ball) with avatar URLs, colors, and animation classes, plus series badge color mappings.
frontend/src/data/plantDatabase.ts: Static database of plant entries, each containing id, name, scientific name, emoji, category, health benefits, ecological benefits, a fun fact, and a color.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlantIdentificatio: Implements client-side plant identification by analyzing image pixel data (color ratios, uniformity, edge sharpness) and matching results against a plant database to produce a ClassificationResult.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user points, plant discoveries, user profiles, and leaderboard data, with localStorage fallbacks for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Wraps the Web Speech API to provide speak and stop functions with preferred voice selection, exposing speaking state and browser support status.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles including Tailwind directives, a deep forest green/gold design token palette for light and dark modes, and keyframe animations used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/identification.ts: Defines TypeScript types for plant classification results, discriminating between real plant, non-plant, and non-real (artificial) image outcomes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Playfair Display), a design-token-based color palette (forest, gold, cream, shadcn variables), custom border radii, box shadows, and several keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a game/app with Google auth, a leaderboard, and an anime character selection system (Naruto, One Piece, Bleach, Dragon Ball) featuring autonomous character animations, along with required avatar image specs and existing feature definitions.
